title: Zero-Click Diagnosis
summary: 5 pages with impressions and 0 clicks analyzed. Root causes: position depth (not yet page 1), title not matching query intent, formula-slug looking URLs. Fixes applied where indexable.

diagnoses.root_cause: Title didn't include the exact answer ($405.53) — users couldn't confirm the page had their answer before clicking
diagnoses.fix: Added $405.53 to title. Meta now includes exact monthly payment and total interest.
diagnoses.expected_impact: Higher CTR from exact-answer match in SERP snippet

diagnoses.query: retirement income calculator how to use
diagnoses.root_cause: Title had 'Free Free' duplication (bug) and generic framing — didn't match 'how to use' query intent
diagnoses.fix: Fixed double-Free bug. Changed to 'How to Use X — Step-by-Step Guide 2026' matching query intent.
diagnoses.expected_impact: Better CTR from matching 'how to use' query framing

diagnoses.root_cause: Title was brand-oriented ('$100k Salary...') rather than intent-matching ('how much house can I afford')
diagnoses.fix: New title: 'How Much House Can I Afford on $100K Income?' directly matches query intent
diagnoses.expected_impact: Moderate — position 18 is deep, title improvement helps but ranking needs to rise

diagnoses.root_cause: City name was buried mid-title — didn't stand out in SERP for 'philadelphia' queries
diagnoses.fix: Moved 'Philadelphia, PA' to front of title. Meta now mentions local rates.

diagnoses.root_cause: Page is canonicalized to loan-calculator — Google may show the canonical target or the variant
diagnoses.fix: Did NOT edit page (canonicalized). Improved blog post covering identical topic instead.
diagnoses.expected_impact: Blog post improvement (position 11) should capture this traffic with better title
